Section Order: 1. Hero with headline, 2. Value prop, 3. Key features (3-5), 4. CTA section, 5. Footer
Color Strategy: Hero: Brand primary. Features: Card bg #FAFAFA. CTA: Contrasting accent
Recommended Effects: Hero parallax, feature card hover lift, CTA glow on hover
Conversion Optimization: Deep CTA placement. Use contrasting color (7:1 contrast ratio). Sticky navbar CTA.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Problem statement, 3. Solution overview, 4. Testimonials carousel, 5. CTA
Color Strategy: Hero: Brand color. Testimonials: Light bg #F5F5F5. CTA: Vibrant
Recommended Effects: Testimonial carousel slide, quote mark animations, avatar fade-in
Conversion Optimization: Social proof before CTA. Use 3-5 testimonials. Include photo + name + role.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Product video/mockup, 3. Feature breakdown, 4. Comparison, 5. CTA
Color Strategy: Video surround: Brand color overlay. Features: Icon #0080FF
Recommended Effects: Video play button pulse, feature scroll reveals, demo highlights
Conversion Optimization: Embedded product demo increases engagement. Auto-play video muted.

Section Order: 1. Hero headline, 2. Short description, 3. Benefit bullets (3 max), 4. CTA, 5. Footer
Color Strategy: Minimalist: Brand + white + accent. Buttons: High contrast 7:1+
Recommended Effects: Minimal hover effects. CTA scale on hover (subtle)
Conversion Optimization: Single CTA focus. Large typography. Lots of whitespace.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Step 1 (problem), 3. Step 2 (solution), 4. Step 3 (action), 5. CTA
Primary CTA Placement: Each step: mini-CTA. Final: main CTA
Color Strategy: Step colors: 1 (Red/Problem), 2 (Orange/Process), 3 (Green/Solution)
Recommended Effects: Step number animations, progress bar fill, smooth scroll
Conversion Optimization: Progressive disclosure. Show only essential info per step.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Problem intro, 3. Comparison table, 4. Pricing, 5. CTA
Primary CTA Placement: Table: Right column. CTA: Below table
Color Strategy: Table: Alternating rows. Your product: Highlight #FFFACD or green
Recommended Effects: Table row hover highlight, price toggle, checkmark animations
Conversion Optimization: Use comparison to show unique value. Highlight your product row.

Keywords: lead, form, signup, capture, email, magnet
Section Order: 1. Hero (benefit headline), 2. Lead magnet preview, 3. Form (minimal fields), 4. CTA submit
Color Strategy: Lead magnet: Professional design. Form: Clean white. Inputs: Light border
Recommended Effects: Form focus animations, input validation, success confirmation
Conversion Optimization: Form fields <= 3 for best conversion. Offer valuable lead magnet preview.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Price comparison cards, 3. Feature comparison table, 4. FAQ, 5. Final CTA
Primary CTA Placement: Each card: CTA button. Sticky nav CTA
Color Strategy: Free: Grey, Starter: Blue, Pro: Green/Gold, Enterprise: Dark
Recommended Effects: Price toggle monthly/yearly, card hover lift, FAQ accordion
Conversion Optimization: Recommend starter plan. Show annual discount (20-30%). Use FAQs.

Section Order: 1. Hero with video background, 2. Key features overlay, 3. Benefits, 4. CTA
Color Strategy: Dark overlay 60% on video. Brand accent for CTA. White text on dark.
Recommended Effects: Video autoplay muted, parallax scroll, text fade-in
Conversion Optimization: 86% higher engagement with video. Add captions. Compress video.

Section Order: 1. Intro hook, 2. Chapter 1 (problem), 3. Chapter 2 (journey), 4. Chapter 3 (solution), 5. Climax CTA
Primary CTA Placement: End of each chapter + Final climax CTA
Color Strategy: Progressive reveal. Each chapter distinct color. Building intensity.
Recommended Effects: ScrollTrigger animations, parallax layers, chapter transitions
Conversion Optimization: Narrative increases time-on-page 3x. Use progress indicator.

Section Order: 1. Dynamic hero, 2. Relevant features, 3. Tailored testimonials, 4. Smart CTA
Color Strategy: Adaptive based on user data. A/B test color variations.
Recommended Effects: Dynamic content swap, fade transitions, personalized recommendations
Conversion Optimization: 20%+ conversion with personalization. Requires analytics integration.

Section Order: 1. Hero with countdown, 2. Product teaser, 3. Email capture form, 4. Social proof
Primary CTA Placement: Email form prominent (above fold) + Sticky scroll
Color Strategy: Anticipation: Dark + accent. Countdown in brand color. Urgency indicators.
Recommended Effects: Countdown timer, email validation, success confetti, social share
Conversion Optimization: Scarcity + exclusivity. Show waitlist count. Early access benefits.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Comparison matrix, 3. Feature deep-dive, 4. Winner CTA
Color Strategy: Your product highlighted (accent bg or green). Competitors neutral.
Recommended Effects: Table row hover, feature checkmark, sticky comparison header
Conversion Optimization: Show value vs competitors. 35% higher conversion.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Pricing cards (3 tiers), 3. Feature comparison, 4. FAQ, 5. Final CTA
Primary CTA Placement: Each pricing card + Sticky nav + Bottom
Color Strategy: Popular plan: brand color border. Free: grey. Enterprise: dark.
Recommended Effects: Price toggle animation, card hover lift, FAQ accordion
Conversion Optimization: Annual discount 20-30%. Recommend mid-tier. Address objections in FAQ.

Section Order: 1. Hero with device mockup, 2. Screenshots carousel, 3. Features, 4. Reviews, 5. Download CTAs
Primary CTA Placement: Download buttons prominent (App Store + Play Store)
Color Strategy: Dark/light matching app store. Star ratings in gold. Device frames.
Recommended Effects: Device mockup rotations, screenshot slider, star rating animations
Conversion Optimization: Show real screenshots. Include ratings (4.5+ stars). QR code for mobile.

Section Order: 1. Hero with search bar, 2. Popular categories, 3. FAQ accordion, 4. Contact CTA
Color Strategy: Clean, high readability. Category icons in brand color. Success green.
Recommended Effects: Search autocomplete, smooth accordion, category hover
Conversion Optimization: Reduce support tickets. Track search analytics. Show related articles.

Section Order: 1. Full-screen interactive element, 2. Guided product tour, 3. Key benefits, 4. CTA
Color Strategy: Immersive colors. Dark background for focus. Highlight interactive elements.
Recommended Effects: WebGL, 3D interactions, gamification, progress indicators
Conversion Optimization: 40% higher engagement. Performance trade-off. Provide skip option.

Section Order: 1. Hero (date/location/countdown), 2. Speakers grid, 3. Agenda, 4. Sponsors, 5. Register CTA
Primary CTA Placement: Register CTA sticky + After speakers + Bottom
Color Strategy: Urgency colors (countdown). Event branding. Speaker cards professional.
Recommended Effects: Countdown timer, speaker hover cards, agenda tabs, early bird countdown
Conversion Optimization: Early bird pricing with deadline. Social proof. Speaker credibility.

Section Order: 1. Hero (product + aggregate rating), 2. Rating breakdown, 3. Individual reviews, 4. Buy/CTA
Primary CTA Placement: After reviews summary + Buy button alongside reviews
Color Strategy: Trust colors. Star ratings gold. Verified badge green.
Recommended Effects: Star fill animations, review filtering, helpful vote, photo lightbox
Conversion Optimization: User-generated content builds trust. Show verified purchases.

Section Order: 1. Hero (community value prop), 2. Popular topics, 3. Active members showcase, 4. Join CTA
Primary CTA Placement: Join button prominent + After member showcase
Color Strategy: Warm, welcoming. Member photos. Topic badges in brand colors.
Recommended Effects: Member avatars animation, activity feed, topic hover previews
Conversion Optimization: Show active community (member count

Section Order: 1. Hero (problem state), 2. Transformation slider, 3. How it works, 4. Results CTA
Color Strategy: Contrast: muted/grey (before) vs vibrant/colorful (after). Success green.
Recommended Effects: Slider comparison, before/after reveal, result counters, testimonial videos
Conversion Optimization: Visual proof of value. 45% higher conversion. Real results.

Section Order: 1. Hero (Search), 2. Categories, 3. Featured Listings, 4. Trust/Safety, 5. CTA
Color Strategy: Search: High contrast. Categories: Visual icons. Trust: Blue/Green.
Recommended Effects: Search autocomplete, map hover pins, card carousel
Conversion Optimization: Search bar is the CTA. Reduce friction. Popular searches suggestions.

Section Order: 1. Hero (Value Prop + Form), 2. Recent Issues, 3. Social Proof (Subscriber count), 4. About Author
Primary CTA Placement: Hero inline form + Sticky header form
Color Strategy: Minimalist. Paper-like background. Text focus. Accent color for Subscribe.
Recommended Effects: Text highlight, typewriter effect, subtle fade-in
Conversion Optimization: Single field form (Email only). Show subscriber count. Read sample link.

Section Order: 1. Hero (Topic + Timer + Form), 2. What you'll learn, 3. Speaker Bio, 4. Urgency, 5. Form
Color Strategy: Urgency: Red/Orange. Professional: Blue/Navy. Form: High contrast white.
Recommended Effects: Countdown timer, speaker avatar float, urgent ticker
Conversion Optimization: Limited seats logic. Live indicator. Auto-fill timezone.

Section Order: 1. Hero (Video/Mission), 2. Solutions by Industry, 3. Solutions by Role, 4. Client Logos, 5. Contact Sales
Color Strategy: Corporate: Navy/Grey. High integrity. Conservative accents.
Recommended Effects: Slow video background, logo carousel, tab switching for industries
Conversion Optimization: Path selection (I am a...). Mega menu navigation. Trust signals.

Section Order: 1. Hero (Name/Role), 2. Project Grid (Masonry), 3. About/Philosophy, 4. Contact
Color Strategy: Neutral background. Text: Black/White. Accent: Minimal.
Recommended Effects: Image lazy load reveal, hover overlay info, lightbox view
Conversion Optimization: Visuals first. Filter by category. Fast loading essential.

Section Order: 1. Intro (Vertical), 2. The Journey (Horizontal Track), 3. Detail Reveal, 4. Footer
Primary CTA Placement: Floating Sticky CTA or End of Track
Color Strategy: Continuous palette transition. Chapter colors. Progress bar.
Recommended Effects: Scroll-jacking (careful), parallax layers, horizontal slide, progress indicator
Conversion Optimization: Immersive product discovery. Keep navigation visible.

Section Order: 1. Hero, 2. Bento Grid (Key Features), 3. Detail Cards, 4. Tech Specs, 5. CTA
Primary CTA Placement: Floating Action Button or Bottom of Grid
Color Strategy: Card backgrounds: #F5F5F7 or Glass. Icons: Vibrant brand colors.
Recommended Effects: Hover card scale (1.02), video inside cards, tilt effect, staggered reveal
Conversion Optimization: Scannable value props. High information density without clutter.

Section Order: 1. Hero (Configurator), 2. Feature Highlight (synced), 3. Price/Specs, 4. Purchase
Primary CTA Placement: Inside Configurator UI + Sticky Bottom Bar
Color Strategy: Neutral studio background. Product: Realistic materials. UI: Minimal overlay.
Recommended Effects: Real-time rendering, material swap animation, camera rotate/zoom
Conversion Optimization: Increases ownership feeling. 360 view reduces return rates.

Section Order: 1. Prompt/Input Hero, 2. Generated Result Preview, 3. How it Works, 4. Value Prop
Color Strategy: Adaptive to user input. Dark mode for compute feel. Neon accents.
Recommended Effects: Typing text effects, shimmering generation loaders, morphing layouts
Conversion Optimization: Immediate value demonstration. Show don't tell. Low friction start.
